detail.description:
An idle Xianxia RPG you can enjoy completely hands-free.

From the awakening of your spirit roots to the perfection of the Nascent Soul, every moment of idle cultivation resonates with the Dao—an unbroken echo of your unwavering will.

When you awaken, the world around you is unfamiliar.
Your companions are gone without a trace, leaving behind only silence—and a lingering sense of unease.

As the leader, you make your choice:
to journey across the Immortal Realm and uncover the truth behind thei
detail.releaseNotes: Fixed some bugs and optimized the gaming experience
